Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 210 Timings - Al Shahama Bus Station to Dalma Mall

November 22, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system offers affordable and reliable travel across the city and its suburbs. Among its key routes, Bus 210 connects Al Shahama Bus Station to Dalma Mall, serving both residential and commercial areas.

Operational Details

Bus 210 operates consistently throughout the day, ensuring frequent and convenient service for passengers. Below are the key timings for Bus 210 departing from both Al Shahama Bus Station and Dalma Mall:

From Al Shahama Bus Station From Dalma Mall
05:15 05:07
06:15 06:04
07:15 07:07
08:15 08:08
09:15 09:08
10:15 10:08
11:15 11:07
12:15 12:08
13:15 13:05
14:15 14:06
15:15 15:07
16:15 16:06
17:15 17:05
18:15 18:05
19:15 19:03
20:15 20:07
21:15 21:04
22:15 22:08
23:15 23:07

Download PDF Bus 210

Bus 210 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or simply follow this link for the 210 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for Bus 210 are made through the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. For travel within one zone, the fare is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can conveniently top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks across the city for a smooth, cash-free experience.

Route Overview

Bus 210 runs between Al Shahama Bus Station and Dalma Mall Main Entrance, passing through a variety of key locations such as educational institutions, malls, healthcare centers, and cultural landmarks. Below is the full list of stops along this route:

  1. Al Shahama Bus Station The starting point, serving residents of Al Shahama and nearby areas.

  2. ADIB A major banking stop for daily commuters.

  3. Green Mart Market A hub for grocery shopping and daily necessities.

  4. Civil Defence A stop providing access to public safety services.

  5. Al Reef School Catering to the local community’s educational needs.

  6. Al Shahama School Another important educational facility on the route.

  7. F1 Assembly Point A notable gathering area.

  8. Al Widayhi Street A residential stop providing local access.

  9. Deerfields Mall A popular shopping destination for residents.

  10. ADNOC A convenient stop for refueling and essential services.

  11. Al Khawarizmi International College A leading higher education institution.

  12. Al Bahya Park A public park for recreation and leisure.

  13. Al Naham Street A residential area with easy access to local amenities.

  14. Souq A marketplace offering a variety of goods.

  15. Al Marhoum Eid Al Muraykhi Mosque (two stops) A spiritual and cultural landmark.

  16. Mazyad Mall (two stops) A large mall with numerous shopping and dining options.

  17. Bohra Islamic Cultural Complex A center for religious and cultural activities.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Burjeel Medical City A key stop for medical services.

  2. Al Ain University A prominent educational institution.

  3. LLH Medical Centre / Al Najah Private School Serving both healthcare and education needs.

  4. Mubarak Bin Sumaida Mosque / Al Mussafah Park A combined spiritual and recreational stop.

  5. Al Widad Street, Al Dolpheen Street, Al Daraj Street Residential streets providing local access.

  6. First Abu Dhabi Bank An important stop for financial services.

  7. Emirates Identity Authority Factory Offering essential government services.

  8. Dalma Mall West A secondary stop for easier mall access.

  9. Dalma Mall Main Entrance The final stop, leading to one of Abu Dhabi’s largest shopping centers.

Accessibility and Services

Bus 210 is equipped to accommodate passengers with special needs, ensuring that everyone can enjoy a comfortable journey. The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for those with mobility issues.
  • Audio-visual aids for passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

This makes Bus 210 an inclusive option for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Throughout the journey, passengers on Bus 210 can access several major attractions and landmarks:

  1. World Trade Centre A vibrant hub for exhibitions, conferences, and corporate events, offering insights into Abu Dhabi’s business landscape.

2.

  1. Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary Situated near the industrial area, this remarkable natural reserve is home to a diverse range of bird species, including flamingos, making it a great spot for nature enthusiasts and bird watchers.

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 210 from Al Shahama Bus Station to Dalma Mall offers a scenic and varied journey through Abu Dhabi’s urban and suburban landscapes.

Notable along the route is Burjeel Medical City, a leading healthcare facility, and the Bohra Islamic Cultural Complex, highlighting the area’s cultural diversity. Passing through residential areas like Al Reef, with its schools and local markets, the journey concludes at Dalma Mall, one of Abu Dhabi’s largest shopping centers, offering both practical travel and a unique view of the city’s development.

Travel Tips for Bus 210

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to avoid unnecessary waiting, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick, cashless payment on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to optimize your journey.
  • Avoid Peak Times: If you prefer a quieter ride, avoid traveling during the busiest periods in the morning and afternoon.

Bus 210 provides a dependable and convenient option for traveling between Al Shahama Bus Station and Dalma Mall. Whether you’re commuting to work, enjoying a shopping trip, or heading to school, Bus 210 guarantees a seamless and budget-friendly ride. Jump on Bus 210 to discover the various areas of Abu Dhabi effortlessly! For a complete list of bus routes in Abu Dhabi, be sure to check out the full bus routes available.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 22, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
